meta.name: stremio-ai-knowledge
meta.description: AI Agent Knowledge Base for Stremio Addon Development

channel.description: Multiple videos grouped under one entity. Use for models, collections, channels, performers.
channel.usage: A model/performer page with multiple videos becomes a 'channel' type. The meta handler returns a videos array with episode-like entries.

movie.description: Single standalone video. One meta entry maps to one stream.
movie.usage: A standalone video page that is not part of a series or collection.

series.description: Episodic content with seasons and episodes.
series.usage: TV shows or content organized into seasons/episodes.

errors_quick.kvs_404_no_slug: Use /embed/{id}/ instead of /video/{id}/ — KVS requires slug in video URLs
errors_quick.vercel_timeout: Cache responses, minimize HTTP requests, use 10s max on Hobby plan
errors_quick.kvs_slug_required: Store full video URLs from model pages or use embed URLs
errors_quick.defaultVideoId_loop: NEVER set defaultVideoId in channel meta — causes infinite back-loop in Stremio
errors_quick.kvs_get_stream_ua_redirect: KVS /get_stream/ URLs work as direct stream.url — Stremio's UA triggers 302 CDN redirect. NEVER use externalUrl for video streams.
errors_quick.missing_nav_streams: Add externalUrl streams with stremio:///detail/channel/ deep links — meta.links alone is NOT enough. Users navigate from the streams list 95% of the time.
errors_quick.base64_ids_break_meta: NEVER use base64/base64url for Stremio IDs. Use encodeURIComponent/decodeURIComponent instead. Base64 produces opaque strings that can't be used as URL paths and break the meta handler (Error #16).
errors_quick.non_kvs_no_embed_needed: Not all adult sites are KVS. Check site structure first. Some sites (like xxdbx.com) have everything on /view/{id} — no embed page needed.

app_limitations.library_is_manual: User must explicitly click 'Add to Library' — there is no programmatic way to add items to a user's library.
app_limitations.search_is_string_only: Stremio search is plain-text string matching only. No filters, no faceted search, no advanced queries.
app_limitations.caching_is_app_side: The Stremio app handles caching of catalog and stream responses. Addons cannot control cache TTL directly. Use behaviorHints to influence caching behavior.
app_limitations.channel_videos_not_streams: Channel type videos are shown as a clickable list, NOT as stream options. Click a video to see its streams.
app_limitations.search_returns_mixed_types: Search queries all searchable catalogs across types. Both channel and movie results appear together.

mp4.description: Direct MP4 video file URL. This includes KVS /get_stream/ URLs that redirect to CDN via User-Agent-based 302.
mp4.implementation: Return as stream.url with behaviorHints.notWebReady: false. Stremio's player UA triggers 302 redirect for KVS get_stream URLs.

m3u8.implementation: Return as stream.url with behaviorHints.notWebReady: true. Stremio desktop does not natively handle HLS without this flag.

torrent.description: BitTorrent info hash with optional trackers
torrent.implementation: Return stream object with infoHash and optional sources array of tracker URLs.

cross_navigation.description: Stremio deep links for in-app navigation (NOT for video playback). The ONLY acceptable use of externalUrl.
cross_navigation.implementation: Return as stream.externalUrl with stremio:///detail/ deep links. This navigates WITHIN Stremio, not a browser/webview.

id_encoding.rule: ALWAYS use encodeURIComponent/decodeURIComponent for Stremio IDs that contain names

wrong.problem: Opaque string, can't be used as URL path, meta handler can't decode it to scrape /stars/Della+Cate

stream_fix_v2.discovery: KVS /get_stream/ URLs are User-Agent-based redirect gateways. Browser UA gets 200 HTML, but Stremio's non-browser UA gets 302 redirect to CDN (vkuser.net) which serves proper MP4 files.
stream_fix_v2.key_rule: NEVER use externalUrl for video streams — it opens a browser/webview. Always use stream.url for direct video URLs.
